caption: A digital presentation screen features a dark blue background themed around global connectivity, displaying a stylized blue Earth at the bottom and an interconnected network of lines and nodes spanning across the scene. A thin blue horizontal bar runs across the top of the screen. In the center of the image, the text "How ?" is displayed in a white, sans-serif font. In the top right corner, a small inset video window shows a man with short dark hair wearing a light-colored shirt, looking toward the camera. Throughout the sequence of frames, the visual elements remain static; the background imagery, the central text "How ?", and the man in the inset window do not change in position, appearance, or action.
